scripts.setup:
mkdir -p .claude
ln -sfn "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.claude/settings.local.json" .claude/settings.local.json
mise trust
mise install
pnpm install
scripts.run: mise install >/dev/null; eval "$(mise activate bash --shims)"; if ! supabase status >/dev/null 2>&1; then ./infra/scripts/with-secrets.sh "${SECRETS_ENV:-local}" supabase start; fi; PORT="$CONDUCTOR_PORT" ./infra/scripts/with-secrets.sh "${SECRETS_ENV:-local}" pnpm exec astro dev --host "${ADE_DEV_HOST:-127.0.0.1}" --port "$CONDUCTOR_PORT"
